[10:32:37 INF] Booting up Azure-Api-Management-DevOps-Resource-Kit v1.0.0.0 running .NET .NET 7.0.20
ArmTemplates 1.0.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 DoneTechno

  --extractorConfig                    Config file of the extractor

  --sourceApimName                     Source API Management name

  --destinationApimName                Destination API Management name

  --resourceGroup                      Resource Group name

  --fileFolder                         ARM Template files folder

  --apiName                            Single API name

  --multipleAPIs                       Comma-separated list of API names

  --linkedTemplatesBaseUrl             Creates a master template with links

  --linkedTemplatesSasToken            Creates a master template with links

  --linkedTemplatesUrlQueryString      Query string appended to linked templates
                                       uris that enables retrieval from private
                                       storage

  --policyXMLBaseUrl                   Writes policies to local XML files that
                                       require deployment to remote folder

  --policyXMLSasToken                  String appended to end of the linked
                                       templates uris that enables adding a SAS
                                       token or other query parameters

  --splitAPIs                          Split APIs into multiple templates

  --apiVersionSetName                  Name of the apiVersionSet you want to
                                       extract

  --includeAllRevisions                Includes all revisions for a single api -
                                       use with caution

  --baseFileName                       Specify base name of the template file

  --paramServiceUrl                    Parameterize serviceUrl

  --paramNamedValue                    Parameterize named values

  --paramApiLoggerId                   Specify the loggerId for this api

  --paramLogResourceId                 Specify the resourceId for this logger

  --serviceBaseUrl                     Specify the the base url for calling api
                                       management

  --notIncludeNamedValue               Should not include named values template

  --paramNamedValuesKeyVaultSecrets    Parameterize named values where value is
                                       retrieved from a Key Vault secret

  --operationBatchSize                 Group the operations into batches of x?

  --paramBackend                       Parameterize environment specific values
                                       from backend

  --extractGateways                    Attempt to extract information about
                                       Self-Hosted gateways

  --overrideGroupGuids                 Override group GUID identification to
                                       system generated

  --overrideProductGuids               Override product GUID identification to
                                       system generated

  --paramApiOauth2Scope                Parametrize API OAuth2 scope values

  --extractSecrets                     Extract secrets from the services if
                                       applies

  --extractIdentityProviders           Extract identity providers from the
                                       service if applies

  --parametersOutputDirectoryName      Parameters output directory name, by
                                       default it is "parameters"

  --excludeBuildInGroups               Excludes built-in groups from generated
                                       template if set to "true"

  --help                               Display this help screen.

  --version                            Display version information.

[10:32:37 INF] Azure API Management DevOps Resource toolkit finished.
